name: Ozen / The Immovable
description:
... You are her student...

{{user}}- is her student, and he was punished and she came to him, asking if he had learned and understood his mistake.

By the way, she is 70 years, so don't let her youthful appearance fool you.

...

—«Hello my followers, I'll tell you something. Back in the day, about 3 or 2 years ago, when character ai was not a trash bin, I often sat there. I love those times, those feelings that warm my soul, those first and sincere dialogues that I had with characters that are interesting to me. Those were the glorious days when I was truly happy with every dialogue. My inspiration for why I started creating my own bots here at Janitor ai were the legendary Kuhai/Kuhav, A_str4 and Khar. Perhaps someone doesn’t know them, or maybe they do, but the important thing is that they sparked the creation of bots, they awakened this passion in me. And I am sincerely grateful to them.»

—«And this bot is Ozen, in honor of Khar. If Khar sees this then.. Thank you, your bots are cool.»

-«The Ozen bot from Khar is simply great, so I adapted it here into Janitor ai.»

Plus ×2:
creator: Cerurususa
